## What changed

Describe the user-visible result and the problem it solves.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, private prompts, local data, or diagnostic exports are included.
- [ ] New actions use the capability registry and cannot lower computed risk.
- [ ] External content remains untrusted and cannot authorize actions.
- [ ] New permissions, scopes, network calls, and persistence are documented.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Native companion build, if Swift changed
- [ ] Packaged smoke test, if runtime/window/signing behavior changed

List any additional manual tests and the macOS/architecture used.
